news_items.headline: No Sho, no problem: Smith's leadoff HR sparks Dodgers vs. SF
Revisiting the Blaze Alexander Trade Way Too Early
news_items.summary: Introduction On February 5th, 2026 Arizona Diamondbacks GM Mike Hazen sent fan favorite infielder Blaze Alexander to the Baltimore Orioles in exchange for relief pitcher Kade Strowd, along with two minor league prospects, RHP Wellington Aracena and infielder Jose Mejia. It definitely hasn’t been long enough to evaluate this trade fairly, and won’t be for […]

news_items.headline: M's Raleigh lands on IL for first time in career
news_items.summary: The Mariners placed catcher Cal Raleigh on the 10-day injured list on Thursday morning with a right oblique strain, the first IL stint of the AL MVP runner-up's career in his sixth major league season.

news_items.headline: Rays have tentative deal for $2.3B Tampa stadium
news_items.summary: The Rays and local officials announced a tentative $2.3 billion agreement for a new ballpark in Tampa funded by public and private money.

news_items.headline: Day after injury scare, Soto homers as Mets roll
news_items.summary: Juan Soto returned to the starting lineup and homered Thursday for the injury-riddled New York Mets.

news_items.headline: White Sox say fan who fell into the bullpen OK
news_items.summary: White Sox said in a statement that the fan who tumbled roughly 10 feet into the visiting bullpen at Rate Field during Wednesday night's 6-5 win over Kansas City seemed to be doing well.

news_items.headline: Seager aims to 'figure it out' amid 0-for-27 slump...
news_items.summary: Corey Seager is going through a slump like none he has ever had to endure in the big leagues. The two-time World Series MVP is hitless in his last seven games which is part of a longer 0-for-27 span, also a career long, that includes 11 strikeouts.

news_items.headline: Twins send scuffling outfielder Wallner to minors
news_items.summary: The Twins sent struggling right fielder Matt Wallner to their Triple-A team and promoted right-handed pitcher Zebby Matthews to start against the Marlins on Thursday.

news_items.headline: ⚾ MLB mock draft: 1st-round projections, intel
news_items.summary: Starting with an intriguing decision at the top of the board, here's how the first 40 picks of this July's draft could play out.

news_items.headline: Will Smith and Alex Call help Dodgers overcome mistakes in win over Giants
news_items.summary: Hitting from the leadoff spot, Will Smith homers in the first inning before Alex Call delivers a pinch-hit, two-run single in the Dodgers' 5-2 win over the Giants.

news_items.headline: Can Mets ride momentum against scuffling Yankees? Here are 5 players who could tilt the Subway Series
news_items.summary: Can Juan Soto and the Mets continue to dig themselves out of a nightmare start? Or will players like Cam Schlittler and Ben Rice help the Yanks break out of a mini-slump?

news_items.summary: Keeping track of every game this season, all in one place

news_items.headline: Dodgers rally to back Emmet Sheehan, beat Giants
news_items.summary: The Dodgers scored three runs in the sixth inning to back a strong start by Emmet Sheehan to beat the San Francisco Giants 5-2 on Thursday night at Dodger Stadium and salvage a series split after dropping the first two games. Teoscar Hernández figured prominently on both sides of the ball in and around left […]
